word: H5878 - עֵין חֲרֹד - ʻÊyn Chărôd - ane khar-ode' - Well of Harod

sections.paragraph:
Original: עין חרד

Transliteration: ‛êyn chărôd

Phonetic: ane khar-ode'

BDB Definition:

En-harod = "spring of Herod"
  1. a camping place of Gideon and Israel near the hill of Moreh

Origin: from H5869 and a derivative of H2729

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
